list.name: Changes
list.comment: ﻿Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/AveGeofencing/Ave # Please enter a commit message to explain why this merge is necessary, # especially if it merges an updated upstream into a topic branch. # # Lines starting with '#' will be ignored, and an empty message aborts # the commit.

task.summary:
Remove foreign key from refresh_tokens table
This migration drops the foreign key constraint `refresh_tokens_user_id_fkey` on the `refresh_tokens` table. The downgrade step restores the constraint with `CASCADE` rules for updates and deletes.

Refactor user management and enhance authentication flows
Replaced deprecated database fetch methods and refined user creation logic. Added login and logout functionality with token handling, streamlined email verification, and improved password reset flow. This update ensures better modularity, security, and maintainability.

Clean up workspace.xml change list comments
Removed verbose and unnecessary comments from the `.idea/workspace.xml` file to streamline the project configuration. This helps reduce clutter and focus on essential settings.

Remove `env.yaml` and update `.gitignore`
Deleted `env.yaml` containing sensitive information and added it to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental inclusion in the repository. This improves security and aligns with best practices for handling environment variables.

MESSAGE.value:
Remove foreign key from refresh_tokens table
This migration drops the foreign key constraint `refresh_tokens_user_id_fkey` on the `refresh_tokens` table. The downgrade step restores the constraint with `CASCADE` rules for updates and deletes.

Refactor user management and enhance authentication flows
Replaced deprecated database fetch methods and refined user creation logic. Added login and logout functionality with token handling, streamlined email verification, and improved password reset flow. This update ensures better modularity, security, and maintainability.

Clean up workspace.xml change list comments
Removed verbose and unnecessary comments from the `.idea/workspace.xml` file to streamline the project configuration. This helps reduce clutter and focus on essential settings.

Remove `env.yaml` and update `.gitignore`
Deleted `env.yaml` containing sensitive information and added it to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental inclusion in the repository. This improves security and aligns with best practices for handling environment variables

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Remove `env.yaml` and update `.gitignore`
Deleted `env.yaml` containing sensitive information and added it to `.gitignore` to prevent accidental inclusion in the repository. This improves security and aligns with best practices for handling environment variables
